TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv_Kari_Menten, title = Kari_Menten, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Seediq]}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/wiki/Kari_Menten} }

S.FORM: Kari Menten uxe de kesun daha Kari Burma we, kari tnpusu na seediq meniq Bamar, kari qnlhangan na Burma uri. 3000 mang kana hei ka tnkari Menten. Alang skari Kari Menten Menten Taykwo Mongcyara Lao Cenpucay Dndulan Kari Kari Myeik Kari Beik. Kari Dawei. Kari Yaw. Kari Intha. Kari Taungyo. Kari Danu. Patis Pnskngalan Hnghengak Hengak Bubu Duma kari Menten Kari Beyax Pusu Bobo Dheran lutuing:sany tu-nyi lwatlapsau: gun.sikhka.hprang. lany:kaung:| tu-nyi-lwatlapsau: ahkwang.-are:mya:hprang. lany:kaung:| mwe:hpwa:la.su-mya: hpracsany|| htuisutui.hnai puing:hkra: wehpantatsau: nyanhnang. kyang.wat si.tatsau: cittui.hri.kra.rwe htuisutui.sany ahkyang:hkyang: mettahta:rwe hcakhcamkyang.sum:sang.e|| "Kana seediq bobo dheran nii we, traguh kndalax pnttingan ta; mntena ka beyax pusu ta. Pniqan gnkela ka knkingal seediq, kiya ka, asi ta ka mntena mptswayi mggaalu ma mptbale msuupu." (Tg1 patis, Kari Beyax Pusu Bobo Dheran) Papak == Patis pnyahan ==
S.PHON: ka…ĺi m…ônt…ôn ux…ô d…ô k…ôsun dańßa ka…ĺi bu…ĺma w…ô, ka…ĺi tnpusu na s…ô…ôdiq m…ôniq bama…ĺ, ka…ĺi qnlńßaŇčan na bu…ĺma u…ĺi. **** maŇč kana ńß…ôi ka tnka…ĺi m…ônt…ôn. alaŇč ska…ĺi ka…ĺi m…ônt…ôn m…ônt…ôn tajkwo moŇč ¶ja…ĺa lao ¶…ônpu ¶aj dndulan ka…ĺi ka…ĺi mj…ôik ka…ĺi b…ôik. ka…ĺi daw…ôi. ka…ĺi jaw. ka…ĺi intńßa. ka…ĺi tauŇčjo. ka…ĺi danu. patis pnskŇčalan ńßŇčńß…ôŇčak ńß…ôŇčak bubu duma ka…ĺi m…ônt…ôn ka…ĺi b…ôax pusu bobo dńß…ô…ĺan lutuiŇč:sanj tu-nji lwatlapsau: gun.sikńßka.ńßp…ĺaŇč. lanj:kauŇč:| tu-nji-lwatlapsau: ańßkwaŇč.-a…ĺ…ô:mja:ńßp…ĺaŇč. lanj:kauŇč:| mw…ô:ńßpwa:la.su-mja: ńßp…ĺa ¶sanj|| ńßtuisutui.ńßnai puiŇč:ńßk…ĺa: w…ôńßpantatsau: njanńßnaŇč. kjaŇč.wat si.tatsau: ¶ittui.ńß…ĺi.k…ĺa.…ĺw…ô ńßtuisutui.sanj ańßkjaŇč:ńßkjaŇč: m…ôttańßta:…ĺw…ô ńß ¶akńß ¶amkjaŇč.sum:saŇč.…ô|| "kana s…ô…ôdiq bobo dńß…ô…ĺan nii w…ô, t…ĺaguńß kndalax pnttiŇčan ta; mnt…ôna ka b…ôax pusu ta. pniqan gnk…ôla ka knkiŇčal s…ô…ôdiq, kija ka, asi ta ka mnt…ôna mptswaji mggaalu ma mptbal…ô msuupu." (tg* patis, ka…ĺi b…ôax pusu bobo dńß…ô…ĺan) papak == patis pnjańßan ==
S.FORM: Kari Menten uxe de kesun daha Kari Burma we, kari tnpusu na seediq meniq Bamar, kari qnlhangan na Burma uri. 3000 mang kana hei ka tnkari Menten. Alang skari Kari Menten Menten Taykwo Mongcyara Lao Cenpucay Dndulan Kari Kari Myeik Kari Beik. Kari Dawei. Kari Yaw. Kari Intha. Kari Taungyo. Kari Danu. Patis Pnskngalan Hnghengak Hengak Bubu Duma kari Menten Kari Beyax Pusu Bobo Dheran lutuing:sany tu-nyi lwatlapsau: gun.sikhka.hprang. lany:kaung:| tu-nyi-lwatlapsau: ahkwang.-are:mya:hprang. lany:kaung:| mwe:hpwa:la.su-mya: hpracsany|| htuisutui.hnai puing:hkra: wehpantatsau: nyanhnang. kyang.wat si.tatsau: cittui.hri.kra.rwe htuisutui.sany ahkyang:hkyang: mettahta:rwe hcakhcamkyang.sum:sang.e|| "Kana seediq bobo dheran nii we, traguh kndalax pnttingan ta; mntena ka beyax pusu ta. Pniqan gnkela ka knkingal seediq, kiya ka, asi ta ka mntena mptswayi mggaalu ma mptbale msuupu." (Tg1 patis, Kari Beyax Pusu Bobo Dheran) Papak == Patis pnyahan ==
S.PHON: ka…ĺi m…ônt…ôn ux…ô d…ô k…ôsun dańßa ka…ĺi bu…ĺma w…ô, ka…ĺi tnpusu na s…ô…ôdiq m…ôniq bama…ĺ, ka…ĺi qnlńßaŇčan na bu…ĺma u…ĺi. **** maŇč kana ńß…ôi ka tnka…ĺi m…ônt…ôn. alaŇč ska…ĺi ka…ĺi m…ônt…ôn m…ônt…ôn tajkwo moŇč ¶ja…ĺa lao ¶…ônpu ¶aj dndulan ka…ĺi ka…ĺi mj…ôik ka…ĺi b…ôik. ka…ĺi daw…ôi. ka…ĺi jaw. ka…ĺi intńßa. ka…ĺi tauŇčjo. ka…ĺi danu. patis pnskŇčalan ńßŇčńß…ôŇčak ńß…ôŇčak bubu duma ka…ĺi m…ônt…ôn ka…ĺi b…ôax pusu bobo dńß…ô…ĺan lutuiŇč:sanj tu-nji lwatlapsau: gun.sikńßka.ńßp…ĺaŇč. lanj:kauŇč:| tu-nji-lwatlapsau: ańßkwaŇč.-a…ĺ…ô:mja:ńßp…ĺaŇč. lanj:kauŇč:| mw…ô:ńßpwa:la.su-mja: ńßp…ĺa ¶sanj|| ńßtuisutui.ńßnai puiŇč:ńßk…ĺa: w…ôńßpantatsau: njanńßnaŇč. kjaŇč.wat si.tatsau: ¶ittui.ńß…ĺi.k…ĺa.…ĺw…ô ńßtuisutui.sanj ańßkjaŇč:ńßkjaŇč: m…ôttańßta:…ĺw…ô ńß ¶akńß ¶amkjaŇč.sum:saŇč.…ô|| "kana s…ô…ôdiq bobo dńß…ô…ĺan nii w…ô, t…ĺaguńß kndalax pnttiŇčan ta; mnt…ôna ka b…ôax pusu ta. pniqan gnk…ôla ka knkiŇčal s…ô…ôdiq, kija ka, asi ta ka mnt…ôna mptswaji mggaalu ma mptbal…ô msuupu." (tg* patis, ka…ĺi b…ôax pusu bobo dńß…ô…ĺan) papak == patis pnjańßan ==
